cycle.description:
Cycle at which the unstake request was created.  
**[sortable]**

roundingError.description: Protocol rounding error, appearing after slashing.

actualAmount.description: Actual amount that was/is/will be available for finalizing.

unlockCycle.description: Cycle at which the unstake request will become finalizable

unlockLevel.description: Level of the block at which the unstake request will become finalizable

unlockTime.description: Timestamp of the block at which the unstake request will become finalizable

updatesCount.description: Number of staking updates related to the unstake request.

firstLevel.description:
Level of the block where the unstake request was created.  
**[sortable]**

firstTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the unstake request was created.

lastLevel.description:
Level of the block where the unstake request was last updated.  
**[sortable]**

lastTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the unstake request was last updated.
